log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:4+3=7 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:3+-2=1 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:5+-2=3 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 3/3 targets affected.
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Ogre.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:10+-2=8 vs DC 16] FAIL! 4 psychic damage. HP: 55/59
→ ⚠ Ogre: Charm broken by damage! No longer incapacitated.
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:19+6=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician HP: 53/67
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Ogre.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:5+-2=3 vs DC 16] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 50/59
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:7+6=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Ogre.

=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Ogre.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:18+-2=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:8+6=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician HP: 31/67
→ Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 7 vs DC 10]
=== ROUND 6 ===
--- Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:7+3=10 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Frost Giant WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:19+3=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:16+6=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 9 damage. Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician HP: 22/67
=== ROUND 7 ===
--- Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Ogre.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:14+-2=12 vs DC 16] FAIL! 6 psychic damage. HP: 37/59
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician.
→ Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician healed for 9 HP. HP: 31/67
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:12+9=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 33 damage. Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
→ Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hold Person! [CON save 6 vs DC 16]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 7 rounds ===
